scripts.dev: cd src-tauri && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which rustc)"):$PATH" cargo-tauri dev
scripts.build: cd src-tauri && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which rustc)"):$PATH" cargo-tauri build --bundles app
scripts.test: cd src-tauri && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which rustc)"):$PATH" cargo test
scripts.tauri: cd src-tauri && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which rustc)"):$PATH" cargo-tauri
